das3_eis_ezs.limits: The source does not establish every vehicle/EIS, FBS generation, RHD location or wiring.

fbs3.notes: Do not equate every DAS3 vendor menu with every FBS3 vehicle.

smart_legacy.notes: Smart SAM/immobiliser systems are not inherited from Mercedes passenger-car EIS/EZS.
